titleStmt.title: SII 24.192: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 192. (A.R. No. 53 of 1892.) EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Records that when the temple managers colluded with the Oṭṭar in misappropriating the temple funds a large assembly comprising of all the administrative bodies met at the West Tiruvīdi of Rājamahēndraṉ Tiruvīdi and resolved that the executive functions in the administration of the temple must be entrusted to individuals carefully selected, excluding the defaulters responsible for the misappropriation of temple funds, by rotation. Each individual or body may perform the function for one year. The individual must be selected on the occasion of Śrīpushpayāgam. The record is dated in the 9th regnal year of Māṟavarmaṉ Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Sundara Pāṇḍya ‘who gave back Śōṇāḍu’ and quotes the details Mēsha, ba 3, Friday, Viśākhā, which regularly correspond to 1225 A.D., March 28, Friday, ·88, ·41.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī pāṟka . vyavasthaippaṭi śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅki Aruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu
meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tṛtiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattunāḷ jīyar nārāyaṇadāsarum koyil kūṟu Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya coḻa brahmā
rāyarum periya tiruppati vaiṣṇavarkaḷum tiruppaṇi ceyyum jaṉaṅkaḷum śrī pākavata nampimārum tiruvaraṅkattu sabhaiyārum viṇṇappañceyyum nampimārum [śrī]pātan
tāṅkum nampimārum tiruvācal Āriyaruḷḷiṭṭa palapaṇi nimantakkāṟarum koyila karattu bhaṭṭarkaḷum Emperumāṉār tiruvaṭikaḷai Āśrirattirukkum śrīvaiṣṇavar kaḷum periyatiru
nāḷ cevikka naṭanta patiṇeṉ maṇṭalattu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum rājamahentiraṉ tiruviti melait tiruvitiyil kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu vyavasthai paṇṇiṉapaṭi muṉṉāḷil koyilukku nirvvāha
karāy patiṉamuceytu ponta pattupperumāka Avaravar kālattu Oṭṭaroṭe kūṭi niṉṟu koyililum nimantakkāṟar pakkalilum Oṭṭukkācu kūṭṭikkuṭukkaiyālum nilai yāḷ Eṉṟu kūṭṭi tiruviṭaiyā
ṭṭaṅkaḷil nellai Eṭuttu Oṭṭarkku kuṭukkaiyālum maṟṟum palavaḻikaḷāle tiru viṭaiyāṭṭattil Uṭalkaḷai Aḻikkaiyāle Iraṇṭu samvatsarattilāka muṉṉūṟṟuc ciṉṉam nā
ḷ tiruvārātaṉam Orunāḷppaṭi koṇṭu pala nāḷ paṭi celutta Ippaṭi nāḷ viḻukaiyālum pala maṇṭalaṅkaḷil tiruviṭaiyāṭṭaṅkaḷ taṅkaḷukku paṟṟāka kūṟiṭṭu Aṭaittuk koṇṭu taṅkaḷ Āḷka
ḷ pokaviṭṭu taṇṭivanta Uṭalkaḷ tāṅkaḷum Oṭṭarumāka koḷkaiyālum Ippaṭi tiruvārātaṉan taṭṭuppaṭṭateṉṟum śrīpaṇṭāra Uṭalkaḷ Ippaṭi Aḻiyāniṉṟa teṉṟum māṟakaṅ kotittuk kūppiṭṭu tiriya
c ceyte Ivarkaḷ tāṅkaḷ varumaipaṭattirikaiyālum Ippotu Oṭṭaṟku kā� maṉṟiye rājakiyamāy nañ cāmantaṉāre koyilai kaikkoṇṭu Iraṇṭu karai nāṭṭu tiruviṭaiyāṭṭaṅkaḷaiyum tantu Amutupaṭi cāttu
ppaṭikaḷum kuṟaivaṟṟu tiruppaṇikaḷum ceṉṟu nallakālamā yirukka muṉpu Oṭṭaruṭa ṉe kūṭi niṉṟu Aṉṉiyāyakārikaḷāy ponta Ivarkaḷ neṭunāḷpaṭa kāṇi pole ceytu porukaiyāle Ippaṭi Aṉṉiyāya
ṅkaḷ piṟantatu Ippaṭi ceytu ponta Ivarkaḷai tavirntu samvatsaraparyan=tamāka periya tirunāḷ śrī puṣpayāgañ camaintavāṟe patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalamum kūṭi Iruntu Ittiruppati kottile Ā
vāraittaṭṭi Iṭakkaṭavatākavum Āṇṭācaṟutiyāṉavāṟe māṟi Āvārai pārttu Iṭakkaṭavatākavum śrīvaiṣṇavavāriyat tuṟaikaḷum Ippaṭiye samvatsaraparyan=ta māka māṟa
Iṭakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi vyavasthai paṇṇiṉom paṇiyāl Ivai koyil kaṇakku Aricaraṇālayappiriyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Iraṇṭāyiram Eḻuttiṭṭu viṭṭatu .
Digital edition of SII 24.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
